audit_items.proof_trace: The s_entered flag is set to true at L418 before any external call (safeTransfer at L444, auctionCallback at L449, safeTransferFrom at L453). Any re-entry into bid hits the if (s_entered) check at L415-416 and reverts. All other state-modifying functions require privileged roles (AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE, ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE) that an attacker cannot satisfy; view functions (isValidSignature, checkUpkeep) also check or are harmless.
